decisions.rationale: Readiness classification is performed by deterministic Agentify shadow script using structured issue-text heuristics; no model invocation is required at the current autonomy level.
decisions.failure_impact: Misclassification of readiness may delay human review but does not modify source code.
decisions.reversibility: Operator can re-classify by editing the issue or by adding human context; no code is changed.
decisions.human_control_checkpoint: Operator reviews evidence-packet.json before any later draft implementation.

decisions.rationale: Pilot Wave 1 does not publish draft PRs in this prompt. Implementation is explicitly excluded until draft promotion is evaluated and per-run approval is granted.
decisions.reversibility: Fully reversible; no branch or PR exists.
decisions.fallback: Engagement stops at shadow evidence; no further action.
